Title: Verify Dashboard Activity Initialization
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the DashboardActivity.
Expected Result: DashboardActivity initializes successfully with the specified attributes (BrowserLayout, navigationView, toolbar).

Title: Verify MainActivity Lifecycle Methods Execution
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to MainActivity.
3. Observe onCreate(), onResume(), onStart(), onStop(), and onDestroy() methods execution.
Expected Result: All lifecycle methods execute as expected without errors.

Title: Verify SignInActivity Lifecycle Methods Execution
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to SignInActivity.
3. Observe onCreate(), onResume(), onStart(), onStop(), and onDestroy() methods execution.
Expected Result: All lifecycle methods execute as expected without errors.

Title: Verify UserListActivity Lifecycle Methods Execution
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to UserListActivity.
3. Observe onCreate(), onResume(), onStart(), onStop(), and onDestroy() methods execution.
Expected Result: All lifecycle methods execute as expected without errors.

Title: Verify Weather Display and Zoom Functionality
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Click on the "weather" button.
4. Verify local weather is displayed.
5. Click on the zoom in button.
6. Verify ability to search for weather of other locations.
Expected Result: Local weather is displayed correctly, and the zoom in functionality works as expected.

Title: Verify Province and Route Selection Process
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Trekking".
3. Request and display the list of provinces.
4. Select a province.
5. Request and display the list of routes in the selected province.
6. Select a route.
7. Verify the selected route is displayed.
Expected Result: The list of provinces and routes is displayed correctly, and the selected route is shown accurately.

Title: Verify Health Data Retrieval Process
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Health".
3. Request and display the list of past training sessions.
Expected Result: The list of past training sessions is retrieved and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Weather Data Retrieval Process
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Weather".
3. Request weather data from the server.
4. Verify weather data is received and displayed.
Expected Result: Weather data is retrieved from the server and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Navigation Between Activities
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate from MainActivity to SignInActivity.
3. Navigate from MainActivity to UserListActivity.
Expected Result: Navigation between MainActivity and other activities works as expected.

Title: Verify Edge Cases for Weather Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the home screen.
3. Click on the "weather" button.
4. Attempt to search for weather using invalid input.
Expected Result: System handles invalid input gracefully, displaying appropriate error messages.

Title: Verify Edge Cases for Trekking Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Trekking".
3. Attempt to select an invalid province.
4. Attempt to select an invalid route.
Expected Result: System handles invalid selections gracefully, displaying appropriate error messages.

Title: Verify Edge Cases for Health Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Health".
3. Attempt to retrieve health data with no internet connection.
Expected Result: System handles lack of internet connection gracefully, displaying appropriate error messages.

Title: Verify Edge Cases for Weather Data Retrieval
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Weather".
3. Attempt to retrieve weather data with no internet connection.
Expected Result: System handles lack of internet connection gracefully, displaying appropriate error messages.
